name: Normal Production
description: All zones operating within normal limits
expected_ai_actions: Monitor key sensors, confirm no anomalies, log shift status.

name: Gas Leak During Confined Space Entry
description: Minor gas leak escalates during confined space work in basement
expected_ai_actions: Detect gas accumulation, correlate with confined space permit P001, escalate from minor to major leak, trigger evacuation and emergency shutdown.

name: Hot Work Near Gas Leak
description: Hot work starts near area with rising gas levels
expected_ai_actions: Combine hot work event with gas leak, classify explosion risk, recommend stopping hot work and isolating gas.

name: Worker Collapse
description: Worker collapses in quench area during normal production
expected_ai_actions: Detect worker collapse from RTLS/CV, prioritize medical response, temporarily shut down local equipment.

name: Emergency Shutdown
description: Controlled emergency shutdown after detected risk
expected_ai_actions: Show full plant response to major risk: ramp-down flows/pressures, close valves, reduce gas production.

name: Hot Work Near Tar Extractor with Pressure Rise
description: Authorized hot work proceeds near the tar extractor while pressure, gas, and temperature gradually deteriorate into a flame-detected process upset
expected_ai_actions: Correlate hot work permit P002 with rising %LEL, pressure surge, and confirmed flame detection near the tar extractor; classify fire/explosion risk, recommend immediate hot work stoppage and emergency shutdown of the extraction line.
